entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for histochemical changes after toxin treatment

entities.name: SG TOXIN
entities.description: A toxin used to treat pearl millet seeds to study its effects

entities.name: HISTOCHEMICAL CHANGES
entities.description: Changes in the chemical composition and distribution of substances in cells

entities.name: POLYSACCHARIDE GRANULES
entities.description: Granules of polysaccharides that increase and then decrease during symptom development

entities.name: PAS POSITIVE GRANULES
entities.description: Granules that react positively to Periodic Acid-Schiff staining

entities.name: PROTEINOPLASTS
entities.description: Protein-containing plastids that disintegrate during symptom development

entities.name: NUCLEIC ACIDS
entities.description: Genetic material that decreases during symptom development

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed development into a seedling

entities.name: BUNDLE SHEATH CELLS
entities.description: Specialized cells in the leaves where polysaccharide granules increase
